source_archetype: Static HTML table/list + detail pages + PDFs
fields_visible: title, version, date issued, status/development status, detail URL, PDF URL via detail page
extractor_type: requests + BeautifulSoup static table/list parser with detail-page follow
pdf_strategy: Capture PDF URL from detail page; parse PDF later only for deep fields
implementation_note: Best first connector if optimizing for reusable baseline table/list parsing.
known_disagreement: Low. Reports broadly agree it is easy/static.
next_action: Implement or run a 10-minute verification fetch, then implement.

source_archetype: Static HTML tables + status tabs + detail pages + PDFs
records_expected: ~13 active / ~20-25+ including broader status pages (report estimates vary)
fields_visible: sector/scope, title, version, status via tab, detail URL, PDF URL via detail page
api_visible: No public methodology API; possible WordPress REST lead only
extractor_type: requests + BeautifulSoup table parser; follow detail pages for current PDF
pdf_strategy: Capture current approved PDF URL; avoid deprecated archive PDFs unless flagged
implementation_note: High-value connector; more complex than Climate Forward due to version archives/status pages.
known_disagreement: Low on feasibility; reports differ only on whether it should be first or second.
next_action: Implement after Climate Forward, or first if prioritizing business value.

source_archetype: Potential static methodology cards + PDF links + adopted CDM methods; or scattered PDFs depending on report
records_expected: ~8 to 15+ if methodology page is live; otherwise only known PDFs
fields_visible: code, title, programme/sector, PDF URL, version/date from PDF filename or PDF
js_required: No, according to Gemini/Claude; disputed by ChatGPT report due missing public list
api_visible: No public methodology API verified; possible WordPress REST lead
extractor_type: Verify first. If page exists: static card parser + filename regex. If not: manual/PDF-source-resolution connector.
pdf_strategy: Use href filename regex for date/version where present; parse PDF later for confirmation
implementation_note: Potentially high value and actively updated, but reports conflict on whether the public list exists.
known_disagreement: High. ChatGPT says no stable public consolidated list; Gemini/Claude say static cards exist.

source_archetype: Static HTML index + per-method detail pages + PDFs/modules/tools
fields_visible: SCM code, title, description, status, sector, modules/tools, version history, detail URL, PDF URL
api_visible: Possible Squarespace JSON lead; not needed initially
extractor_type: requests + BeautifulSoup index parser + detail-page crawler
pdf_strategy: Capture PDF anchors from detail pages; parse PDFs later for deep fields
implementation_note: Good next connector after first table/card parsers; adds modules/tools and version history.
known_disagreement: Low. Reports agree it is buildable and useful.
next_action: Implement after Climate Forward/ACR/Cercarbono baseline patterns.

source_archetype: Approved-methodology cards + S3 PDFs + modules/tools; or broader unstructured technical library depending on report
fields_visible: PM001/PM002 code, title, version, status, type, active-from date, developer, reviewer, PDF URL
extractor_type: If approved-methodologies page is live: static card parser. If using technical library: PDF classifier.
pdf_strategy: Capture S3-hosted PDF; parse later for effective dates/developer confirmation
implementation_note: Reports conflict because they target different Plan Vivo pages. Approved-methodologies page appears easiest. Technical-library URL removed 2026-07-06 because it returns 404.
known_disagreement: High. ChatGPT/Claude find clear approved methods; Gemini treats it as scattered PDF library.
next_action: Verify approved-methodologies URL and card structure before coding.

source_archetype: Methodology cards/detail pages + HubSpot PDFs, or dynamic document library depending report
fields_visible: title/category, durability tier, edition/version, detail URL, PDF URL, status
js_required: Disputed: ChatGPT/Gemini say JS/dynamic for document library; Claude says methodology cards are static
api_visible: Puro Connect/API reported but not verified; do not rely yet
extractor_type: Verify. If static cards: requests + BS4 card parser + detail follow. If dynamic library: Playwright/XHR intercept.
pdf_strategy: Capture HubSpot PDF hrefs; parse PDF for edition/version if not visible in HTML
implementation_note: Potentially high signal for engineered CDR, but should not be coded until static vs dynamic pathway is verified.
known_disagreement: Medium-High. Reports differ on whether JS is required.
next_action: Run verification fetch on methodology landing page and document library.

source_archetype: Sector landing pages + PDF/document library; PDF-first metadata
fields_visible: sector, title, PDF URL in HTML; code/version/effective date may live inside PDFs
js_required: No for methodology pages; registry is separate JS SPA
api_visible: No public methodology API observed; possible WordPress REST lead
extractor_type: static link harvester + PDF metadata parser
pdf_strategy: Parse first pages for BCR code/version/date; handle ES/EN duplicates and non-uniform layouts
implementation_note: Useful but should come after HTML-only connectors because authoritative metadata may be PDF-first.
known_disagreement: Medium. Reports differ on whether HTML has full codes/versions or PDFs do.
next_action: Defer until PDF parsing strategy is added.

records_expected: TREES standards/templates/version lineage, not many methodologies
fields_visible: document title, version, language, PDF URL, standard status
js_required: Possibly for some resource lists; core PDF/static pages likely accessible
api_visible: No public methodology API observed; possible WP REST lead
extractor_type: source-resolution/document-family connector, not normal MethodUnit extractor
pdf_strategy: Capture standard PDFs and templates; parse version/date
implementation_note: Valuable as a semantic edge case: 'methodology' equals programme standard.
known_disagreement: Low. Reports agree it is not a normal catalogue.
